sentence: 小区里的住户反映停车位不够用。
pinyin: Xiǎoqū lǐ de zhù hù fǎnyìng tíngchēwèi bù gòu yòng.
english: Residents of the compound have complained that there aren't enough parking spaces.

sentence: 这所学校的师资力量很强。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xuéxiào de shīzī lìliàng hěn qiáng.
english: This school has a very strong teaching staff.

sentence: 那只大狗的叫声真吓人。
pinyin: Nà zhī dà gǒu de jiào shēng zhēn xià rén.
english: The barking of that big dog is really scary.

sentence: 这个场馆可以容纳上万名观众。
pinyin: Zhè ge chǎng guǎn kě yǐ róng nà shàng wàn míng guān zhòng.
english: This venue can accommodate tens of thousands of spectators.

sentence: 爷爷每天早上都听收音机里的新闻。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān zǎoshang dōu tīng shōuyīnjī lǐ de xīnwén.
english: Grandpa listens to the news on the radio every morning.
